subcodes.first_line: The Pen of Command, from the Ancient Throne upon the crimson Spot of the divine Lote-Tree, proclaimeth: "There is no God..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم الامر من عرش القدم علی بقعه الحمرآء من السدره المنتهی ینادی انه لا اله
subcodes.subjects: @idolatry, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @idle fancies; lust and passion
